---
title: "a02"
format: html
---

Sam Samler_02/23/2026_Tidy Data Assignment

## Introduction:

My data is from a previous Master's student in Dr. Ichimura's lab group.

Date Downloaded: Download source:

I will use my data to analyze idk

## Data:

I put my data in the raw or processed folder (whatever I put it in)

Read in data here using code

## Analysis:

My data is tidy/not tidy because...

The primary key is...

I have a foregin key that connects...
